hub.subtitle.en: Functional Behavior Assessment, ABC data collection, and Behavior Intervention Plan tools.
hub.subtitle.tr: Functional Behavior Assessment (တၢ်ဂံၢ်တၢ်ဘါတၢ်ဟူးတၢ်ဂဲၤအတၢ်ဟ့ၣ်အါထီၣ်တၢ်ဆၢတဲာ်), ABC တၢ်ဂံၢ်တၢ်ဘါတၢ်ဖီၣ်ဃံးထီၣ်, ဒီး Behavior Intervention Plan (တၢ်ဟူးတၢ်ဂဲၤတၢ်နုာ်လီၤမၤစၢၤအတၢ်ရဲၣ်တၢ်ကျဲၤ) အပီးအလီတဖၣ်.

hub.abc_desc.en: Record antecedent, behavior, and consequence observations
hub.abc_desc.tr: မၤနီၣ်တၢ်အကစၢ်အဆၢကတီၢ်ပူၤကွံာ် (antecedent), တၢ်ဟူးတၢ်ဂဲၤ (behavior), ဒီးတၢ်ကဲထီၣ်အသးခံကါ (consequence) တၢ်ကွၢ်ထွဲတဖၣ်

hub.obs_desc.en: Real-time interval, frequency, or duration recording
hub.obs_desc.tr: တၢ်ဆၢကတီၢ်လိၤလိၤ (real-time) တၢ်ဆၢကတီၢ်အကဆၢ (interval), တၢ်အါစုၤ (frequency), မ့တမ့ၢ်တၢ်ယံၤထီၣ်အဆၢကတီၢ် (duration) တၢ်မၤနီၣ်

hub.interval_desc.en: Partial, whole, or momentary time sampling grid
hub.interval_desc.tr: တၢ်ဆၢကတီၢ်အကဆၢကအိၣ်ထဲတဆၢ (partial), ဂံၢ်ခါးတခါ (whole), မ့တမ့ၢ်တဘျီထဲတဘျီ (momentary) တၢ်ဂံၢ်ဂုၤထူဂုၤ

hub.gas_desc.en: Goal Attainment Scaling with AI-generated descriptors
hub.gas_desc.tr: Goal Attainment Scaling (တၢ်တုၤထီၣ်ပတီၢ်ဖီတၢၣ်အတၢ်ဖီၣ်) ဒီး AI ထုးထီၣ်တၢ်ဒုးနဲၣ်တၢ်

hub.abagraph_desc.en: Publication-standard graphs with phase lines, trend lines, and visual analysis
hub.abagraph_desc.tr: ထုးထီၣ်အပတီၢ်ဂံၢ်တၢ်ဘါ (graphs) ဒီးအကရၢအိၣ်ဖျါ (phase lines), တၢ်လဲၤကျဲအိၣ်ဖျါ (trend lines), ဒီးတၢ်ထံၣ်အကံၤလီၢ်တၢ်သ့ၣ်ညါနၢ်ပၢၢ်

hub.cumrecord_desc.en: Classic Skinner-style cumulative frequency graph — the heritage of ABA data display
hub.cumrecord_desc.tr: Skinner-style cumulative frequency graph (တၢ်အါစုၤအဂံၢ်ဂုၤထူဂုၤလၢအဖှိၣ်ထီၣ်) — ABA တၢ်ဂံၢ်တၢ်ဘါအတၢ်ပာ်ဖျါအသးအတၢ်စူၤလၢအလီၢ်လံၤ

hub.drstrategy_desc.en: Choose the right differential reinforcement strategy (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)
hub.drstrategy_desc.tr: ဃုထၢ differential reinforcement strategy (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL) လၢအဘၣ်

hub.dtt_desc.en: Discrete Trial Training — trial-by-trial recording with mastery criteria and auto-advance
hub.dtt_desc.tr: Discrete Trial Training — တၢ်မၤကွၢ်တကွၢ်ဘၣ်တကွၢ်တၢ်မၤနီၣ်ဒီးတၢ်နၢ်ပၢၢ်အပတီၢ်ဂံၢ်ဂုၤထူဂုၤဒီးတၢ်လဲၤထီၣ်နီၢ်ကစၢ်

hub.fcttemplate_desc.en: Functional Communication Training planning with modality selection
hub.fcttemplate_desc.tr: Functional Communication Training (တၢ်ဆဲးကျိးကသ့အတၢ်သိၣ်လိ) တၢ်ရဲၣ်တၢ်ကျဲၤဒီးတၢ်ဆဲးကျိးအကျိၤအကျဲဃုထၢ

hub.ioacalc_desc.en: Inter-Observer Agreement with 6 methods — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count
hub.ioacalc_desc.tr: Inter-Observer Agreement (IOA, ပှၤကွၢ်တၢ်လိာ်အသးအတၢ်ဘၣ်လိာ်အသး) ဒီး 6 ကျိၤကျဲ — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count

hub.latency_desc.en: Stimulus-to-response time measurement with mean, median, and range statistics
hub.latency_desc.tr: Stimulus-to-response (တၢ်ဒုးအိၣ်ထီၣ်တုၤလၢတၢ်စံးဆၢ) တၢ်ဆၢကတီၢ်တၢ်ထိၣ်ဒီးတၢ်ဂံၢ်တၢ်ဘါ mean (တၢ်အကရၢ), median (တၢ်အခၢၣ်သး), ဒီး range (တၢ်အကရၢကရိၤ)

hub.prefassess_desc.en: Systematic reinforcer identification — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, and Free Operant protocols
hub.prefassess_desc.tr: တၢ်အကျိၤအကျဲ reinforcer (တၢ်ဟ့ၣ်အါထီၣ်စၢၤပျၢၤ) တၢ်ပာ်ဖျါ — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, ဒီး Free Operant အကျိၤအကျဲ

hub.bipgen_desc.en: Draft a Behavior Intervention Plan from your data.
hub.bipgen_desc.tr: ကွဲးထီၣ်တၢ်ဂံၢ်တၢ်ဘါ Behavior Intervention Plan လၢနတၢ်ဂံၢ်တၢ်ဘါ.

quiz_replacement.tr: ဆီကွံာ်တၢ်ဟူးတၢ်ဂဲၤ (replacement behavior / alternative behavior) မ့ၢ်တၢ်မနုၤလဲၣ်?

search_placeholder.en: Search antecedent, behavior, consequence, notes, setting...
search_placeholder.tr: ဃုထံၣ်ဘၣ် antecedent, behavior, consequence, တၢ်ကွဲးနီၣ်, တၢ်အလီၢ်...

nl_edit_placeholder.tr: ဒ်အဒိ "ဆီတလဲ consequence ဆူ teacher ဟ့ၣ်ကျဲတဘျီကဒီး"

fidelity_tip_2.tr: ဟ့ၣ်အါထီၣ် BST (Behavioral Skills Training)

ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.en: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task behavior during math instruction?"
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.tr: ဒ်အဒိ "token economy မၤစှၤလီၤ off-task တၢ်အိၣ်အသးဖဲ math အခါဧါ?"

ph.eg_offtask_behavior_in_math.tr: ဒ်အဒိ Off-task တၢ်အိၣ်အသးဖဲ math

ph.eg_spanish_arabic_somali.tr: ဒ်အဒိ Spanish, Arabic, Somali…

ph.eg_token_economy_fct_protocol.tr: ဒ်အဒိ Token Economy + FCT Protocol

ph.search_terms_eg_reinforcement_fba_dat.tr: 🔍 ဃုထံၣ်တၢ်ကတိၤ... (ဒ်အဒိ "reinforcement", "FBA", "data")

ph.setting_eg_math_class_cafeteria.tr: တၢ်အလီၢ် (ဒ်အဒိ, Math class, Cafeteria)

ph.type_language_eg_spanish_arabic_somal.tr: ဆဲးလီၤ ကျိာ် (ဒ်အဒိ, Spanish, Arabic, Somali)

toast.case_study_generated_begin_phase_1.tr: case study တ့ထီၣ်ဝံၤ! စးထီၣ် Phase 1.

toast.consent_template_exported.tr: consent template ထုးထီၣ်ဝံၤ

toast.consent_template_imported.tr: consent template ထၢနုာ်ဝံၤ

toast.data_loaded_from_cloud.tr: ☁️ data ထၢနုာ်လၢ cloud

toast.effect_sizes_attached_to_iep_prep.en: Effect sizes attached to IEP Prep!
toast.effect_sizes_attached_to_iep_prep.tr: effect sizes ဘျးစဲဆူ IEP Prep!

toast.failed_to_generate_case_study_try_.en: Failed to generate case study. Try again.
toast.failed_to_generate_case_study_try_.tr: တ့ထီၣ် case study တန့ၢ်ဘၣ်. မၤကွၢ်ကဒီး.

toast.failed_to_generate_share_code.tr: တ့ထီၣ် share code တန့ၢ်ဘၣ်

toast.graph_data_attached_to_iep_prep.en: Graph data attached to IEP Prep!
toast.graph_data_attached_to_iep_prep.tr: graph data ဘျးစဲဆူ IEP Prep!

toast.graph_data_ready_autofill_availabl.en: Graph data ready — auto-fill available in Effect Size!
toast.graph_data_ready_autofill_availabl.tr: graph data အိၣ်သးကတဲာ်ကတီၤ — တၢ်ဒိးထၢနုာ်ဒၣ်တၢ်အသးအိၣ်လၢ Effect Size!

toast.iep_prep_packet_generated.tr: IEP prep packet တ့ထီၣ်ဝံၤ ✨

toast.need_at_least_2_data_points_per_ph.en: Need at least 2 data points per phase
toast.need_at_least_2_data_points_per_ph.tr: လိၣ်ဘၣ် data points အစှၤကတၢၢ် 2 လၢ phase တခါစုာ်စုာ်

toast.need_at_least_2_phases_in_the_grap.en: Need at least 2 phases in the Graph (baseline + intervention)
toast.need_at_least_2_phases_in_the_grap.tr: လိၣ်ဘၣ် phase အစှၤကတၢၢ် 2 လၢ Graph (baseline + intervention)

toast.not_a_valid_consent_template_file.en: Not a valid consent template file
toast.not_a_valid_consent_template_file.tr: တမ့ၢ် consent template လံာ်ဖၠူၣ် လၢအဘၣ်

toast.quick_fill_n_items_loaded.tr: Quick Fill: N တၢ်ဖိတၢ်လံၤ ထၢနုာ်ဝံၤ ⚡

toast.share_code_copied_to_clipboard.tr: share code ဒိနီၤလီၤဆူ clipboard!

toast.simulation_started_you_are_now_the.en: Simulation started — you are now the counselor 🎭
toast.simulation_started_you_are_now_the.tr: simulation စးထီၣ်ဝံၤ — ခဲအံၤ နမ့ၢ် counselor 🎭

toast.traffic_light_generated.tr: traffic light တ့ထီၣ်ဝံၤ ✨

toast.autofilled_from_phase_tagged_entri.tr: ဒိးထၢနုာ်ဒၣ်တၢ်ဝံၤလၢ phase-tagged တၢ်ဆဲးလီၤ.

toast.need_2_baseline_2_intervention_ent.en: Need at least 2 baseline and 2 intervention entries with phase tags.
toast.need_2_baseline_2_intervention_ent.tr: လိၣ်ဘၣ်အစှၤကတၢၢ် 2 baseline ဒီး 2 intervention တၢ်ဆဲးလီၤလၢ phase tags.

toast.share_code_too_large.en: Snapshot too large for share code (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} chars, limit 5,000). Use 💾 Download Snapshot instead.
toast.share_code_too_large.tr: Snapshot ဒိၣ်တလၢ share code (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} chars, တၢ်ပာ်ပနီၣ် 5,000). သူ 💾 Download Snapshot အလီၢ်.

ui.based_on_horner_salentine_albin_2003.tr: မ့ၢ်ဒိးအိၣ်ဒီး Horner, Salentine, & Albin (2003)

ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor.en: Choose the right differential reinforcement strategy
ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor.tr: ဃုထၢ differential reinforcement အကျိၤအကွၢ်လၢအဂ့ၤ

ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel.en: Click "Load Student Workspaces" and select multiple .json files saved from BehaviorLens
ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel.tr: ဆဲးနီၣ် "Load Student Workspaces" ဒီးဃုထၢအါ .json တၢ်ဖီၣ်ဖးလၢအဘၣ်တၢ်ပာ်ဂၢၢ်လီၤလၢ BehaviorLens

ui.record_sessions_with_the_session_data.en: Record sessions with the Session Data Tracker, or switch to Manual Entry mode.
ui.record_sessions_with_the_session_data.tr: ကွဲးနီၣ်တၢ်အိၣ်ဖှိၣ်တဖၣ်ဖျိ Session Data Tracker, မ့တမ့ၢ်ဆီတလဲဆူ Manual Entry အကျိၤ.

raw.artificial_intelligence_ai_usage_dis.tr: Artificial Intelligence (AI) တၢ်သုးကျဲးစၢးတၢ်ပာ်ဖျါ

raw.conduct_a_full_functional_behavior_a.en: Conduct a full Functional Behavior Assessment
raw.conduct_a_full_functional_behavior_a.tr: မၤတၢ် Functional Behavior Assessment လၢအလၢပှဲၤ

raw.develop_an_individualized_behavior_i.en: Develop an individualized Behavior Intervention Plan
raw.develop_an_individualized_behavior_i.tr: ဒုးအိၣ်ထီၣ်ပှၤတဂၤစုာ်စုာ်အ Behavior Intervention Plan
